inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total amount borrowed, typically equal to the home purchase price if 0% down payment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount borrowed, typically equal to the home purchase price if 0% down payment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam borç alınan miktar, genellikle %0 peşinat durumunda ev satın alma fiyatına eşittir.

inputs.label: Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate for the VA loan, typically lower than conventional loans.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual interest rate for the VA loan, typically lower than conventional loans.
businessContext_i18n.tr: VA kredisi için yıllık faiz oranı, genellikle geleneksel kredilerden daha düşüktür.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the loan in years; VA loans are commonly 30-year fixed-rate mortgages.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the loan in years; VA loans are commonly 30-year fixed-rate mortgages.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredinin yıl cinsinden süresi; VA kredileri genellikle 30 yıl sabit faizli ipoteklerdir.

inputs.label: Funding Fee Rate
inputs.businessContext: VA funding fee as a percentage of the loan amount; varies based on down payment and service history; can be financed into the loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: VA funding fee as a percentage of the loan amount; varies based on down payment and service history; can be financed into the loan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi tutarının yüzdesi olarak VA fon ücreti; peşinat ve hizmet geçmişine göre değişir; krediye dahil edilebilir.

inputs.label: Property Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual property tax rate assessed on the home value (assumed equal to loan amount).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual property tax rate assessed on the home value (assumed equal to loan amount).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ev değeri üzerinden değerlendirilen yıllık emlak vergisi oranı (kredi tutarına eşit olduğu varsayılır).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
